raw_ocr.ws_snapshot: Sample_Student ilk üç if-then kuralını doğru ve eksiksiz yazmış; eşik yönlerini ve sonuçları doğru belirtmiş. B4-B7 boş, muhtemelen ağaçta yalnızca 3 dal yolu vardı ya da geri kalanları tamamlamamış.

warnings: CRITICAL: Part 1 path matching (3 boxes) not extracted — most important AI-CFT signal in WS7
B4-B7 are not_applicable (tree has 3 paths, consistent with WS6 two-level tree that produces 3 paths)

cross_ws_consistency_check.consistency: WS7 rules are consistent with WS6 tree structure. Root = şeker, second level = yağ. Path count = 3, matching WS6.

student_snapshot.llm_observations: Part 2 own rules are complete and consistent with WS6. Part 1 path matching not captured — cannot assess whether student can read a given tree vs write their own tree. This distinction matters for AI-CFT level.

WS7_P1_box1.rationale: Part 1 path matching not extracted. Cannot assess.

WS7_B1.rationale: Complete if-then rule: şeker ≤ 10 AND yağ ≤ 5 → Tavsiye edilir. Consistent with WS6 tree left-left leaf (recommended). Both conditions with correct operators.
WS7_B1.evidence_quote: Eğer şeker ≤ 10 ve yağ ≤ 5 ise → Tavsiye edilir.

WS7_B2.rationale: Complete if-then rule: şeker ≤ 10 AND yağ > 5 → Tavsiye edilmez. Consistent with WS6 tree left-right leaf. Both conditions with correct operators (mixed ≤ and >).
WS7_B2.evidence_quote: Eğer şeker ≤ 10 ve yağ > 5 ise → Tavsiye edilmez.

WS7_B3.rationale: Complete if-then rule: şeker > 10 → Tavsiye edilmez. Consistent with WS6 tree right branch (not recommended if sugar > 10). Single-condition rule appropriate for depth-1 right branch.

WS7_B4_to_B7.rationale: Student's WS6 tree has 3 paths (left-left, left-right, right). No additional rules needed. Empty is correct.

summary.scoring_note: Part 2 own rules: all 3 rules full credit, well-formed, consistent with WS6. Part 1 path matching: 0 out of 3 captured — overall cannot be scored as full. Re-extraction of Part 1 is critical.

Acquire_confirmed: WS7_B1-B3: Three complete if-then rules from own tree, all correctly formed — LO3.1.1 (rule formulation)
Cross-WS consistency: WS7 rules match WS6 tree structure exactly
Acquire_missing: WS7_P1: Path matching not assessed — cannot confirm LO3.1.1 reading-a-given-tree competency
deepen_signal: WS7_B1-B3: Rules include compound conditions (şeker ≤ 10 AND yağ ≤ 5) — correct handling of multi-level tree logic signals early Deepen (LO3.2.2)

indicators.LO3.1.1: partial — own rules confirmed, given-tree reading not confirmed
indicators.LO3.2.2: approaching — compound rule formulation is correct

gate_4_aicft.ws_contribution_to_portfolio: WS7 Part 2 demonstrates ability to express own tree as if-then rules (Acquire → Deepen transition). Part 1 (reading a given tree) not captured — this is a critical gap for confirming LO3.1.1.
